name: Mud Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the margarine, sugar, cocoa powder, and milk.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it reaches a full boil.
3. Continue boiling for 1 minute after reaching a boil.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter, oats, and vanilla.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
6. Allow to cool and set completely before serving.
